# Version 4.150.0
> **Skia m150 and new rendering APIs** · Released July 7, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.150.0) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v4.150.0)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.150.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.150.0 updates to Skia milestone m150 and adds overdraw visualization and image filter APIs. This release brings new APIs for overdraw visualization, crop and empty image filters, fast bounds culling, and a cached SKCanvas wrapper. Obsolete v4 pre-release members are promoted to errors, .NET Interactive support is removed, and HarfBuzz is updated to 14.2.1.

## Breaking Changes

- **Pre-v4 obsolete API members are now compile errors** — Members marked [Obsolete(error:true)] in the v4 preview series are no longer callable; any remaining uses will produce compile errors. Migrate to the replacement APIs indicated by the obsolete message before upgrading. ([#4195](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4195))

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m150** — The bundled Skia engine advances to m150, bringing upstream rendering improvements, bug fixes, and performance work. ([#4146](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4146))
- **Upstream m150 bug fixes merged** — Additional cherry-picked fixes from the Skia chrome/m150 branch have been merged for improved stability. ([#4190](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4190))
- **Small-sigma raster blur regression fixed** — A raster pipeline blur regression for small sigma values is fixed by defining SK_AVOID_SLOW_RASTER_PIPELINE_BLURS. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4269](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4269))

## API Surface

- **SKColorFilter.CreateOverdraw() added** — A new overdraw visualization color filter lets developers highlight over-drawn pixels for performance analysis. ([#4227](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4227))
- **SKImageFilter.CreateCrop() and CreateEmpty() added** — Two new image filter factories — CreateCrop for region-limited filtering and CreateEmpty for a passthrough filter — are now available. ([#4229](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4229), [#4228](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4228))
- **SKPaint.GetFastBounds() added for quick-reject culling** — GetFastBounds returns the conservative bounding box for a paint in a single call, useful for quick-reject culling before drawing. ([#4271](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4271))
- **.NET Interactive (Polyglot Notebooks) support removed** — The deprecated SkiaSharp.Views.Maui.Controls and .NET Interactive integration has been removed. Migrate to standard MAUI controls. ([#4186](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4186))

## Bug Fixes

- **SKSurface.Canvas wrapper cached across calls** — The SKCanvas wrapper returned by SKSurface.Canvas is now cached, avoiding repeated allocations on every access. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4247](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4247))

## Security

- **HarfBuzz updated to 14.2.1** — The bundled HarfBuzz text-shaping library has been updated to version 14.2.1. ([#4167](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4167))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Updates HarfBuzzSharp to 14.2.1 as part of this release's security and dependency refresh.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

## Release Candidate 1 (June 29, 2026)

Release Candidate 1 added SKPaint.GetFastBounds, overdraw and crop/empty image filters, the blur regression fix, SKCanvas caching, and the final set of upstream m150 cherry-picks.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.0-preview.2.1...v4.150.0-rc.1.1)

## Preview 2 (June 24, 2026)

Preview 2 promoted pre-v4 obsolete members to compile errors, removed .NET Interactive support, and updated HarfBuzz to 14.2.1.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.0-preview.1.1...v4.150.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (June 13, 2026)

Preview 1 updated the bundled Skia engine to milestone m150.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.148.0...v4.150.0-preview.1.1)
